TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Sinpitu Itiniay i Nanzhuang Cen no Miaoli ko Sinpitu a niyaro', 15 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 35 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 100% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 35 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 0% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, ko tamdaw. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: sinpito~u~u itiniaj i nan*ħo~u~uaŋ ʦən no~u miao~uɾi ko~u sinpito~u~u a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. ***% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Sinpitu Itiniay i Nanzhuang Cen no Miaoli ko Sinpitu a niyaro', 15 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 35 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 100% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 35 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 0% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, ko tamdaw. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: sinpito~u~u itiniaj i nan*ħo~u~uaŋ ʦən no~u miao~uɾi ko~u sinpito~u~u a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. ***% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ.
